allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path node_modules\) { Write-Host 'node_modules still exists, trying another approach' } else { Write-Host 'node_modules deleted successfully' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Remove-Item -Path 'node_modules\\electron' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(!\(Test-Path 'node_modules\\electron'\)\) { Write-Host 'electron directory deleted' } else { Write-Host 'electron directory still exists' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "cd 'e:\\AlphaBeat\\nvm-ui'; if \(Test-Path node_modules\) { Rename-Item -Path node_modules -NewName node_modules.old -Force; Write-Host 'Renamed to node_modules.old' } else { Write-Host 'node_modules does not exist' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-Command', 'cd ''e:\\AlphaBeat\\nvm-ui''; Remove-Item -Path node_modules -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Done''' -Wait")
Bash(mv main.js renderer.js index.html style.css backup/)
